text.title: handoff-id-payload Decision Tree
text.summary: Pick supervisor, peer-to-peer, or hierarchical topology.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workflow use 2+ specialised agents?

branch.conclusion: Single-agent — handoff methodology does not apply.

branch.question: Is the topology a supervisor routing to workers, peers collaborating, or nested teams?

branch.conclusion: Use SupervisorDecision routing + Handoff payloads + shared store with append-only events.
Peers exchange handoff payloads via a shared event log; each peer reads from the store on receipt.
Coordinator dispatches to team supervisors; team supervisors dispatch to workers. All three levels use the same handoff schema; the store namespace is per-team.
